LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND, AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL PRECLUDES THESE CLAIMS AND THE RELATED ISSUES FROM BEING RELITIGATED AS THEY WERE ADJUDICATED IN THE PRIOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE (VIOLATION OF CC 1632) OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO WELLS FARGO BECAUSE HOLA PREEMPTS THIS STATE LAW AS TO THE FSB THAT INITIALLY DISTRIBUTED THIS LOAN. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) AND 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FURTHER FACTS WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY AS TO THESE DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF THE COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THE DEFENDANTS HAD A DUTY TO PLAINTIFF IN THE UNDERLYING LOAN DOCUMENTS. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENT PLEAD FACTS TO TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF THE COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THE DEFENDANTS HAD A DUTY TO PLAINTIFF IN THE UNDERLYING LOAN DOCUMENTS. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENT PLEAD FACTS TO TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. Successor By Merger Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Demurrer to the 1st, 2nd, and 7th causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Collateral Estoppel precludes these claims and the related issues from being relitigated as they were adjudicated in the prior Unlawful Detainer action. Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause (Violation of CC 1632) of action is sustained without leave to amend as to Wells Fargo because HOLA preempts this state law as to the FSB that initially distributed this loan. Defendant's Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (Fraud) and 5th cause of action (Negligent Misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead further facts with sufficient specificity as to these defendants. Defendant's Demurrer to the 6th cause of action (Violation of the Covenant of Good faith) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to show the Defendants had a duty to Plaintiff in the underlying loan documents. Plaintiff has sufficient plead facts to toll the Statute of Limitations. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause (Violation of CC 1632) of action is sustained without leave to amend as to Wells Fargo because HOLA preempts this state law as to the FSB that initially distributed this loan. Defendant's Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (Fraud) and 5th cause of action (Negligent Misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead further facts with sufficient specificity as to these defendants. Defendant's Demurrer to the 6th cause of action (Violation of the Covenant of Good faith) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to show the Defendants had a duty to Plaintiff in the underlying loan documents. Plaintiff has sufficient plead facts to toll the Statute of Limitations.
